LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S MOTION ON PETITION AND MOTION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Notice Of Motion On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Motion On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
